title: Gemini Canvas Tutorial: How to Use Google's Most Underrated AI Tool
summary: Gemini Canvas is a feature within Google's Gemini that builds working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from text prompts. The tutorial demonstrates six capability levels from document editing to advanced feature combinations.
writeup: This tutorial covers Gemini Canvas, a feature inside Google's Gemini that turns text prompts into working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts. It walks through six capability levels, starting with document editing and building toward combinations of advanced features. The framing matters because it positions Canvas as a code-generation and multimodal tool driven by prompt engineering rather than manual building. The takeaway: a single Gemini feature spans document work, app and dashboard creation, and audio output from text instructions.
